user.title: Set up CountTogether
user.description:
Enter your CountTogether API token. You can find it in the CountTogether app under Settings → API.

The timezone is taken automatically from your Home Assistant settings.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API token. Please check the token in the CountTogether app.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to CountTogether. Please check your internet connection.

increment.name: Increment counter
increment.description: Increments an UpDown counter by the specified amount.

decrement.name: Decrement counter
decrement.description: Decrements an UpDown counter by the specified amount.

set_value.name: Set counter value
set_value.description: Sets the value of an UpDown counter directly.

set_start_date.name: Set start date (FromDate)
set_start_date.description: Sets the start date of a FromDate counter.

set_end_date.name: Set end date (ToDate)
set_end_date.description: Sets the end date of a ToDate counter.
